entry.title: Prime Intellect's prime-rl Ships Six RL Algorithms With Per-Environment Control
entry.summary: prime-rl's new algorithms layer ships six built-in RL methods and lets you mix training signals per environment in a single run

entry.title: Zapier's AutomationBench-AA Shows Best AI Agents Fail 51% of Real Business Tasks
entry.summary: Artificial Analysis and Zapier launch AutomationBench-AA, revealing that even the best AI agents complete fewer than half of real business workflow tasks without breaking rules

entry.title: Google's Gemini Now Manages Your Small Business Profile and Reviews
entry.summary: Google connects Gemini directly to Google Business Profile, giving small business owners an AI assistant that remembers their brand, analyzes their performance data, and can update their listing in real time.

entry.title: Anthropic's J-Lens Reads Claude's Silent Thoughts Before It Speaks
entry.summary: Anthropic discovers a hidden mental workspace inside Claude that reveals silent reasoning, exposes deceptive intent, and can be shaped to improve model honesty

entry.title: Meta and Google DeepMind Prove LLMs Memorize Exactly 3.6 Bits per Parameter
entry.summary: Researchers from Meta, Google DeepMind, Cornell, and NVIDIA put a hard number on LLM memorization: ~3.6 bits per parameter, with a new framework that cleanly separates memorization from generalization.

entry.title: Apptronik Builds a 90,000-Square-Foot Data Factory to Train Apollo 2 Humanoids
entry.summary: Apptronik's 90,000 sq ft Robot Park and Apollo 2 form a live data pipeline feeding Google DeepMind's Gemini Robotics foundation model, with Apollo 3 in the crosshairs.

entry.title: Tencent's Hy3 Beats Flagship AI Models Without a Trillion Parameters
entry.summary: Tencent's Hy3 is a 295B MoE open-weight model that rivals trillion-parameter flagships at a fraction of the compute cost, now free on OpenRouter for two weeks.

entry.title: Sarvam AI Drops an MCP Server Letting Coding Agents Speak 10 Indian Languages
entry.summary: Sarvam's new MCP server lets coding agents discover and use its Indian-language AI models with a single config line

entry.title: Runway Bets $30M on Paris to Win the World Models Race
entry.summary: Runway opens a Paris research hub with a $30M initial investment, doubling down on world models and physical AI in Europe's hottest AI city.

entry.title: Sakana AI's Namazu Tackles What Google Translate Gets Wrong About Japanese Tone
entry.summary: Sakana AI launches a free Japanese translation tool powered by Namazu, its Japan-adapted model, with translate, proofread, and Q&A modes

entry.title: GitHub Copilot CLI Lets Teams Build Custom AI Agents From Markdown Files
entry.summary: GitHub Copilot CLI now supports custom agents defined in Markdown, turning one-off terminal prompts into repeatable, team-shareable workflows for security, releases, and more.

entry.title: GitHub Drops Moonshot AI's Open-Weight Kimi K2.7 Into Copilot's Model Picker
entry.summary: Moonshot AI's Kimi K2.7 Code is the first open-weight model in GitHub Copilot's picker, bringing a 1T-parameter MoE coding model to millions of VS Code users at lower cost.
